gt_sql: SELECT T3.account_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T1.client_id = T4.client_id AND T4.account_id = T3.account_id  WHERE T1.gender = 'F' ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, T2.A11 ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT d.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(c2.birth_date) FROM client c2 WHERE c2.gender = 'F')
  AND dist.A11 = (SELECT MIN(dist2.A11) 
                  FROM client c3 
                  JOIN district dist2 ON c3.district_id = dist2.district_id 
                  WHERE c3.gender = 'F' 
                    AND c3.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(c4.birth_date) FROM client c4 WHERE c4.gender = 'F'))
question: Name the account numbers of female clients who are oldest and have lowest average salary?
